title: Spawn Egg Backport
description: This adds the new spawn egg textures seen in 25w08a, to work in older versions, no Optifine needed :)
body: # Spawn Egg Backport This is a really simple Resource Pack that adds the new spawn egg textures added in 25w08a, to work in older versions, all the way from 1.13-1.21.4 no Optifine needed :) ___ ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HTcZCflj/images/d945968a3fcfa0dcb1ff7bcffcfbeb29af41d4fa.png)![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/HTcZCflj/images/37e02277c71c1cec8c739b9934ad2f04fde7628c.png) ___ Follow my socials! ➽[Twitch](https://www.twitch.tv/itsmemed_552) ➽[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/itsmemed_554/) ➽[Twitter](https://twitter.com/itsmemed_554) ➽[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@itsmemed_552) ___ Alternate Download Links - [CurseForge download](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/spawn-eggs-backport)
